nasb.text: Blessed are you when men hate you, and ostracize you, and insult you, and scorn your name as evil, for the sake of the Son of Man.

esv.text: “Blessed are you when     people hate you and when they     exclude you and revile you and     spurn your name as evil,     on account of the Son of Man!

cnv.text: 世人為人子的緣故憎恨你們、排斥你們、辱罵你們，棄絕你們的名好像棄絕惡物，你們就有福了。

ccb.text: 你们为人子的缘故而遭人憎恨、弃绝、侮辱、毁谤，就有福了！

csbs.text: 当人们因人子的缘故憎恨你们， 排斥你们，责骂你们， 把你们当做恶人革除你们的名， 你们就是蒙福的。
